hero.title: AI Commercialization Product Manager
hero.subtitle: Embedding LLM capabilities into enterprise products and designing scalable monetization: capability evaluation, RAG/on‑prem delivery, pricing & conversion.

kpis.d: RAG under on‑prem constraints, confidence & explainability, free→paid module strategy.
Revenue planning, industry segmentation, sales enablement and conversion models.
Platform roadmap, data/permission modeling, standard vs custom packaging.

sections.casesHint: Focused on turning AI capability into business impact: framing → tradeoffs → constraints → monetization.
sections.galleryHint: Selected screens from a government platform project.

sastAi.name: SAST: AI False Positive Reduction Module
sastAi.meta: On‑prem | RAG | Free trial → Paid add‑on
sastAi.desc: Built a rule‑constrained RAG workflow to cut false positives (~50%) and triage cost, calling a customer‑hosted LLM to return structured verdict + confidence + evidence.

sastBiz.name: SAST: Revenue Delivery Plan (15M RMB)
sastBiz.meta: Product owner | Industry playbooks | Product‑led selling
sastBiz.desc: Designed a closed loop from segmentation → lead list → outreach → sales kit → POC → signing; displacement for power industry, DevSecOps integration for finance.

sca.name: SCA: Platform Roadmap & Packaging
sca.meta: Competitive framework | Roadmap | Standard vs Custom
sca.desc: Contributed to competitive framework, capability layering, roadmap and packaging boundaries to scale delivery and pricing power.

gov.name: Government: Supply Chain Situational Awareness
gov.meta: SCA × RASP integration | Feature definition & delivery
gov.desc: Unified runtime protection and supply chain risks into one platform with multi‑role workflows.

eju.name: Side Project: EJU Math AI Site
eju.desc: Solved image‑PDF extraction for formulas/geometry via tool/model evaluation; shipped ~10 sets online.

about.title: About
about.p1: I turn complex capabilities into sellable products—define value & constraints, modularize AI features with explainability, and connect to monetization & GTM execution.
about.p2: Strength in enterprise AI productization (on‑prem/security/compliance). I also build side projects to sharpen multimodal & engineering skills.
